name: antigravity-for-codex
description: Use Antigravity CLI from Codex for mature plugin-managed review, planning, reports, jobs, GitHub Actions, release checks, and opt-in Stop gates with explicit Gemini or Claude model selection.

interface.shortDescription: Antigravity CLI reviews, planning, and stop-gate workflows for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Antigravity for Codex connects Codex to the local Antigravity CLI (`agy`) for mature plugin-managed workflows: independent read-only review, adversarial critique, implementation planning, read-only rescue diagnosis, multi-role review fan-out, structured reports, role packs, background jobs, advisory mailbox and leases, lifecycle hooks, GitHub Actions workflow rendering and validation, release checks, opt-in real smoke, and an opt-in Stop hook review gate. It supports explicit model-provider switching between Gemini and Claude models exposed by Antigravity. Claude-through-Antigravity remains separate from claude-for-codex, and this plugin stays within the `agy` command surface. Codex remains the implementation authority; Antigravity provides a separate reviewer or planner perspective.
capabilities: Explicit Gemini or Claude model selection
Structured review output and sanitized reports
Background jobs, status, result, and cancel
Role packs for focused review teams
GitHub Actions workflow rendering and validation
Release checks and opt-in real smoke
defaultPrompt: Use Antigravity to review the current git changes with the default Gemini model.
Use Antigravity with a Claude model to challenge this implementation plan.
Run a multi-role Antigravity review across correctness, security, tests, release, and adversarial perspectives.
Enable the opt-in Antigravity Stop review gate for this repository.
